appDesc.message: Yu ken tanim YouTube i go bek long ol piksa bilong en (long olgeta hap bilong en na ol samting yu no laikim) + yu ken redirect YouTube Shorts + ol liklik nius

mode_restoreDislikes.message: Kisim bek ol samting yu no laikim

mode_unroundCorners.message: Ol samting i no stap long ol kona

mode_playablesBlock.message: Hait long ol samting bilong pilai

mode_aiBlock.message: Ol samting i stap long en

helptip_restoreModes.message: Kisim bek ol samting bilong bipo

helptip_blockModes.message: Ol samting i no gat as bilong en

helptip_perfModes.message: Gutpela wok bilong ol man long mekim wok bilong ol

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Yu ken lukim ol video long YouTube na yu ken lukim ol video long YouTube

helptip_unroundCorners.message: Ol samting i stap klostu long ol samting bilong UI

helptip_disableShorts.message: Redirect Shorts long ol man bilong mekim wok long ol ples bilong ol

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Painim ol liklik hap long pes bilong yu + ol samting yu kisim

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Ol samting bilong pilai i stap hait long pes bilong yu

helptip_adBlock.message: Painim ol liklik hap bilong pes bilong yu long pes bilong yu

helptip_aiBlock.message: Ol samting bilong AI i stap hait long haus + video pes

helptip_reduceAnimations.message: Redukim ol samting bilong mekim wok long en

helptip_idlePrevention.message: Taim yu slip, yu no ken slip

alert_isUpToDate.message: ol i save mekim ol samting i kamap
